payloads.description: Compact mirror of the current PNP status boundary and status-bound coordinates.
Reviewer entrypoint, handoff, and public-review boundary summary.
Status-bound public theorem-emission gate, currently denied and non-activating.
External-review status, currently not accepted and still release-blocking.
Public registry for reproducible verifier run reports.

nonClaims: These static payloads mirror the current aisknab/pnp public-review boundary.
These static payloads are not independent mathematical validation.
These static payloads do not activate public theorem emission or clear release blockers.
